summary: Comprehensive testing of GOVERN.AI compliance platform completed successfully. Tested both backend APIs and frontend UI with full integration verification.

integration_issues.issue: AI response takes 8+ seconds to appear, but functionality works correctly

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section, features bento grid, clients section, CTA, footer
Language toggle (EN/IT) works on both landing page and dashboard
Dashboard overview page shows KPIs (agents, policies, audit events, compliance score)
Recent Activity and Risk Distribution display correctly on overview
Navigation to all dashboard pages via sidebar works
GET /api/agents - lists all agents correctly
POST /api/agents - creates new agents successfully
PUT /api/agents/{id} - updates existing agents
DELETE /api/agents/{id} - deletes agents correctly
GET /api/policies - lists all policies
POST /api/policies - creates new policies successfully
PUT/DELETE /api/policies - update/delete operations work
GET /api/audit - returns audit logs with search/filter functionality
GET /api/compliance - lists compliance standards with correct data
GET /api/dashboard/stats - provides accurate KPI data
POST /api/chat - AI assistant responds to queries (GPT-5.2 integration working)
Agents page shows agent cards with functional edit/delete buttons
Create agent dialog works with form validation
Policies page shows policy list with functional edit/delete buttons
Create policy dialog works with dropdown selections
Audit Trail page shows filterable/searchable table of logs
Compliance page shows standards with progress bars and status badges
AI Assistant page loads with suggestion prompts and chat functionality
Dashboard navigation back to landing page works
Hero CTA button navigates to dashboard correctly
